title: ACCA
text: Home * Organizations * ACCA ACCA - The Americas' Computer Chess Association. The ACCA has membership that spans multiple countries in the Americas and sponsors The Americas' Computer Chess League [1] which is a series of geographical on-line tournaments, notably the: ACCA Americas' Computer Chess Championship ACCA World Computer Rapid Chess Championship Forum Posts [ edit ] ACCA stance on Ippo, Robbo and such by Charles Roberson , CCC , January 06, 2010 External Links [ edit ] The Americas' Computer Chess Association The Americas' Computer Chess League Americas from Wikipedia References [ edit ] ↑ The Americas' Computer Chess League Up one level
